description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single lint stage. Add a lint-python job that runs on runners tagged dev, is excluded from the master branch (except master), and executes a script that sets BASE=$(git merge-base origin/master $CI_BUILD_REF), checks if any *.py files changed since that base, and if so runs docker-compose -p $CI_COMMIT_SHA up --exit-code-from flake8 --build flake8. The job has no image, services, caches, or artifacts defined.
